docket_entries.description: NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2019, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME, NAME AND/OR GENDER NOT REQUIRED. PETITIONER PRESENT IN PRO PER. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514).

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-21-2019 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER ARRYAN HIGGINS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Reset To Sep-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekeron. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioner Arryan Marie Higgins was present in pro per.
No Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing, but as there is no Proof of Publication, petitioner is instructed to return on Thursday, September 12, 2019 for further hearing.

Matter is CONTINUED to Thursday, September 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. for further hearing.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Denied
